interfaces.name: memberLogin
interfaces.description: Authenticate the member and initialize their single-user session for the portal.

interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get homepage content including yearbook introduction, submission deadlines, and quick links metadata.

interfaces.name: getMemberDashboardSummary
interfaces.description: Get dashboard summary of current yearbook submissions, counts, and alerts.

interfaces.name: getMyDogsTableConfig
interfaces.description: Get available columns and default visibility for the My Dogs table.

interfaces.name: getMyDogProfiles
interfaces.description: List the current member’s dog profiles for the My Dogs page with optional filters.

interfaces.name: updateDogProfileStatus
interfaces.description: Update the status (draft/final) of a single dog profile from the My Dogs list.

interfaces.name: bulkLockFinalDogProfiles
interfaces.description: Lock selected dog profiles that are currently marked as final using the Bulk Actions tool.

interfaces.name: getDogProfileDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a dog profile for the Dog Profile Detail page, including activities and summary achievements info.

interfaces.name: getDogProfileEditData
interfaces.description: Get data needed to render the Dog Profile Edit form, including dropdown options and existing values when editing.

parameters.name: dogProfileId
parameters.description: If provided, load existing profile for editing; otherwise prepare for a new profile.

interfaces.name: saveDogProfile
interfaces.description: Create or update a dog profile, including biography and activity tags, and return validation feedback.

id.description: Omit or null when creating a new profile.

interfaces.name: searchActivityTags
interfaces.description: Search and suggest activity tags for a dog profile biography or activities section.

interfaces.name: listDogAchievements
interfaces.description: List achievements for a dog on the Achievements tab with optional filters for year range and minimum events.

interfaces.name: addDogAchievement
interfaces.description: Add a new achievement for a dog on the Achievements tab.

interfaces.name: updateDogAchievement
interfaces.description: Update an existing achievement for a dog.

interfaces.name: deleteDogAchievement
interfaces.description: Delete an achievement from a dog profile.

interfaces.name: saveDogAchievementsSortPreference
interfaces.description: Save the preferred sort order for a dog's achievements (e.g., oldest-first).

interfaces.name: getYearbookAdsList
interfaces.description: List the member’s yearbook ads for the Yearbook Ads page with cost and status summary.

interfaces.name: getYearbookAdEditData
interfaces.description: Get data needed to edit a specific yearbook ad, including ad sizes, add-ons, placement options, and current configuration.

interfaces.name: saveYearbookAd
interfaces.description: Save changes to a yearbook ad, including ad size, text, add-ons, placement, and proofing method, and return updated pricing and validation.

interfaces.name: getSpreadsList
interfaces.description: List existing spreads for the Layouts & Spreads page, including basic status and section info.

interfaces.name: searchLayoutsForSpread
interfaces.description: Search and list available layouts for the Spread Editor layout gallery, supporting filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getSpreadEditorData
interfaces.description: Get data needed to render the Spread Editor for creating or editing a spread.

parameters.name: spreadId
parameters.description: If provided, load existing spread; otherwise initialize defaults for a new spread.

interfaces.name: saveSpread
interfaces.description: Create or update a spread configuration, including layout, dogs, title, and section, and return word count feedback.

id.description: Omit or null when creating a new spread.

interfaces.name: getProofsList
interfaces.description: List proofs for the Proofs & Approvals page, with filter options and action indicators.

interfaces.name: getProofDetail
interfaces.description: Get full proof content, comments, and current approval settings for the Proof Detail page.

interfaces.name: addProofComment
interfaces.description: Add a comment to a proof, specifying visibility and target section.

interfaces.name: updateProofApproval
interfaces.description: Update approval decision and auto-approval settings for a proof, then persist them.

parameters.name: autoApprovalDays
parameters.description: Number of days after which auto-approval occurs, e.g., 3

interfaces.name: getYearbookOrderOptions
interfaces.description: Get available yearbook editions and binding options for the Order Yearbook page.

interfaces.name: getShippingOptionsForOrder
interfaces.description: Calculate shipping options and costs for a proposed yearbook order.

interfaces.name: placeYearbookOrder
interfaces.description: Create and confirm a yearbook order, including edition, quantity, binding, shipping, and payment method.

interfaces.name: getSponsorshipsList
interfaces.description: List existing sponsorships for the Sponsorships page.

interfaces.name: getSponsorshipPackages
interfaces.description: Get available sponsorship packages with sorting for selection on the Sponsorships page.

interfaces.name: createSponsorship
interfaces.description: Purchase a sponsorship package for a specific dog, including sponsor name and message.

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page describing the club, yearbook organization, and timelines.

interfaces.name: getHelpTopics
interfaces.description: Get help and FAQ topics for the Help / FAQ page, including workflows and troubleshooting.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact information and response expectations for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a contact/support request from the Contact page.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateWordCount
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate word counts for biography, ad text, and sponsor messages.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateShippingCost
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate shipping cost from ShippingMethod, quantity, and binding.

helperFunctions.name: _applyAutoApprovalRules
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to schedule and execute auto-approval based on proof settings.
